text: Davis-Bacon labor standards stipulate the wage payment requirements for Carpenters, Electricians,  Plumbers,  Roofers,  Laborers,  and  other  construction  work  classifications that may be needed for the project. The Davis-Bacon wage decision that applies to the project contains a schedule of work classifications and wage rates that must be followed. If you don't have it already (and by now you should), you'll want to get a copy of the applicable Davis-Bacon wage decision.
